title: Add index on migrations.applied_at
body: The migrations table is queried by applied_at frequently but has no index. Adding one would improve lookup performance.

title: Rate limit auth endpoints
body: The OAuth2 endpoints have no rate limiting. Add middleware to prevent brute force attacks.

title: Remove unused CSS custom properties
body: Found 12 unused CSS custom properties in tokens.css that can be cleaned up.

title: Extract task orchestrator to separate service
body: The task execution pipeline is tightly coupled with the API server. Extracting it would improve scalability.

title: Add error boundary to useQuery hook
body: SDK useQuery should catch and surface errors better instead of silently failing.

title: Increase test coverage for seed package
body: The seed package has 62% coverage. Critical paths like CSV parsing and faker generation need more tests.
